meta.title: Services | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Express, cargo, domestic, international, and specialty shipping. Eagle Logistics compares partners to deliver what you need.

hero.headline: What We Deliver
hero.subheadline: From affectionate parcels to families abroad to critical commercial cargo — we handle it all with precision and care.

services.title: Express Domestic
services.description: Priority shipments delivered through our fastest partner routes across India.

services.title: International Express
services.description: Documents and parcels to UK, USA, Australia, and beyond via premium partners.

services.title: Healthcare & Pharma
services.description: Specialized handling for medicines including cold chain logistics for vaccines.

services.title: Food & Homemade
services.description: Gentle packing for pickles, sweets, spices, and homemade snacks with zero-breakage care.

services.title: Student Documents
services.description: Exclusive deliveries for university applications with student-friendly rates abroad.

services.title: Bulk Cargo
services.description: Cost-effective FCL and LCL solutions to major ports and hubs worldwide.

services.title: Domestic Freight
services.description: Seamless connectivity across India through our partner network and hub model.

services.title: Warehousing
services.description: Procurement, storage, processing, packaging, and dispatch through partner facilities.

cta.title: Ready to Ship?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're sending — we'll find the best partner and rate.
